data.title: [af9e-77fc] GREEN: Run migrate-runtime-refs.py on plugins/dso/ to fix all runtime path constructions
data.description:
## What to do
Execute the migration script to inject _PLUGIN_ROOT declarations and replace runtime plugins/dso refs across ~63 scripts.

## Steps

### Step 1: Dry-run preview
python3 plugins/dso/scripts/migrate-runtime-refs.py --dry-run --verbose plugins/dso/
Review: expect inject ops on ~63 files, ~184 replace/annotate ops.

### Step 2: Apply migration
python3 plugins/dso/scripts/migrate-runtime-refs.py plugins/dso/

### Step 3: Verify
bash tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-runtime-refs.sh
Must exit 0.

### Step 4: Run unit tests
poetry run pytest tests/scripts/test-migrate-runtime-refs.py -v

### Step 5: Manual spot-check
Pick 3 representative scripts (one from scripts/, one from hooks/lib/, one from hooks/pre-commit/):
- Confirm _PLUGIN_ROOT declaration is present and correct
- Confirm no code lines still reference plugins/dso/ (except annotated ones)
- Confirm no comment lines were touched

## Note on S1/S2 interaction
This story (S2) touches code lines; S1 (075a-b781) touches comment lines in the same files.
If run in parallel (same Layer 0), git auto-merges will handle them since they modify different lines.
If S1 ran first, ensure comment-line changes are not accidentally reverted.

## What counts as success
- tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-runtime-refs.sh exits 0
- All 7 unit tests pass
- No comment lines were modified by this script
- grep -rn "plugins/dso" plugins/dso/ --include="*.sh" | grep -v "^\s*#" | grep -v "plugin-self-ref-ok" returns empty

## testing_mode: GREEN
